no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: test -f docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-007-federation-topology.md && test -f docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-026-federation.md && grep -q "Federation Path (FEAT-026)" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-020-server-node-state.md && grep -q "Federation Compatibility Hooks (FEAT-026)" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md && ! ddx doc audit 2>&1 | grep -iE "FEAT-026|ADR-007|federation"

All four acceptance criteria are already satisfied by prior commits on the
base branch (base-rev 4fc4fdb0). No new changes are required in this
attempt; the bead's deliverables exist on disk and ddx doc audit reports
no federation-related issues.

AC -> evidence:

1. ADR-007 authored
   File: docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-007-federation-topology.md
   Authored in commit 6e386920 ("docs(helix): ADR-007 federation
   topology + FEAT-026 frame + FEAT-020/021 amendments [ddx-1d4bfbf3]");
   amended in commit eea44b4b ("docs(helix): break ADR-007 ↔ FEAT-026
   cycle [ddx-c739bd73]") to remove the dependency cycle.

2. FEAT-026 authored
   File: docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-026-federation.md (309 lines)
   Authored in commit 6e386920.

3. FEAT-020 + FEAT-021 amended for federation contract
   File: docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-020-server-node-state.md
     Section: "Federation Path (FEAT-026)" (line 156) — covers
     federation_role field, federation flags (--hub-mode, --hub=<host>,
     --federation-allow-plain-http), and federation-state.json reference
     as compatibility hooks only.
   File: docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md
     Section: "Federation Compatibility Hooks (FEAT-026)" (line 581) —
     covers /federation overview route, hub-resolved /nodes/:nodeId/...
     across registered spokes, and ?scope=federation on combined views.

4. ddx doc audit clean (with respect to federation scope)
   ddx doc audit reports zero issues whose message references FEAT-026,
   ADR-007, or "federation". The 86 pre-existing integrity issues are
   environmental duplicate_id artifacts from the worktree being audited
   alongside the parent checkout, plus an unrelated FEAT-002/008/013/
   014/020/SD-013/SD-019 cycle and a helix.workflow.principles
   missing_dep — none introduced by this bead's work.

The verification_command above asserts each of (1)-(4) and exits 0 only
when all hold.
